videos.headline: Jordan James puts Oregon up early
videos.description: Jordan James follows his blockers and finds the end zone to give Oregon the early lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jordan James puts Oregon up early) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Anthony Hankerson powers in for Oregon State TD
videos.description: Anthony Hankerson pulls the Beavers level with a 6-yard rushing touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Anthony Hankerson powers in for Oregon State TD) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dillon Gabriel keeps it for 54-yard rushing Oregon TD
videos.description: Dillon Gabriel keeps it on the option and flies down the sidelines for 54-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dillon Gabriel keeps it for 54-yard rushing Oregon TD) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dillon Gabriel avoids rush, slings it to Traeshon Holden for TD
videos.description: Dillon Gabriel avoids the pass rush, then fires one to the back of the end zone to Traeshon Holden for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dillon Gabriel avoids rush, slings it to Traeshon Holden for TD) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Anthony Hankerson bounces off tackler for Oregon State TD
videos.description: Oregon State gets a touchdown right before halftime as Anthony Hankerson sheds a tackle in the hole and finds the end zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Anthony Hankerson bounces off tackler for Oregon State TD) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oregon's Jordan James scores his 2nd TD of the game
videos.description: Jordan James muscles into the end zone for his second touchdown of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oregon’s Jordan James scores his 2nd TD of the game) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Noah Whittington piles on for Oregon
videos.description: Noah Whittington breaks through the hole for a 27-yard Oregon touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Noah Whittington piles on for Oregon) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jayden Limar goes 65 yards for an Oregon TD
videos.description: Jayden Limar takes the screen pass and goes untouched for a 65-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jayden Limar goes 65 yards for an Oregon TD) 2024/09/14 ESHEET
